Warning message:
package 'lavaan' was built under R version 4.5.2 
====== lavaan-FIML rem: realized- vs expected-information decomposition (phase-8 non-monotone) ======
R=2000 per N; committed empirical (R=40k): -0.336(800) -> -0.456(1500); analytic leading ~ -0.24

-- N=800 (2000 ok) --
   rem_real = A_rb - tr_obs(realized) = +0.1963 (0.4186)   [committed -0.336]
   rem_exp  = A_rb - tr_obs(expected) = +0.8237 (0.4189)   [analytic leading ~ -0.24]
   gap = tr_exp - tr_real (PAIRED)    = -0.6275 (0.0057)   <-- realized-information term
   (tr_real=8.279  tr_exp=7.651)

-- N=1500 (2000 ok) --
   rem_real = A_rb - tr_obs(realized) = -0.5685 (0.5598)   [committed -0.456]
   rem_exp  = A_rb - tr_obs(expected) = +0.0138 (0.5601)   [analytic leading ~ -0.24]
   gap = tr_exp - tr_real (PAIRED)    = -0.5824 (0.0042)   <-- realized-information term
   (tr_real=8.224  tr_exp=7.641)

-- N=3000 (2000 ok) --
   rem_real = A_rb - tr_obs(realized) = -0.8876 (0.7779)   [committed n/a]
   rem_exp  = A_rb - tr_obs(expected) = -0.3190 (0.7781)   [analytic leading ~ -0.24]
   gap = tr_exp - tr_real (PAIRED)    = -0.5686 (0.0029)   <-- realized-information term
   (tr_real=8.203  tr_exp=7.634)
